description: Manual calibration samples for lurePace respawn model. Auto-capture via npm run capture:lure-pace when Playwright auth works.

protocolFields.intervalSeconds: Displayed respawn timer in hunt UI
protocolFields.minSeconds: Fastest possible respawn for this hunt
protocolFields.maxSeconds: Slowest possible respawn for this hunt
protocolFields.speed: Total equipment SPEED stat (server-computed, likely sum of all slots)
protocolFields.effectiveLevel: Character effective level for respawn calc

calibration.notes: Respawn is per-hunt (lurePace), not per-monster. SPEED: 20 points = 1s faster. LURE_PARALLEL_FACTOR tunes kills per respawn wave.
